metric_name: BestBuy: buying tips for week of 2003-06-15
metric_value: At Best Buy stores this week, save $100 with Best Buy's mail-in rebate on all computer packages. Also receive no interest financing for 18 months on all these CPU bundles.
notes: Extracted from "BestBuy" section

metric_name: Circuit City: buying tips for week of 2003-06-15
metric_value: Save up to $350 on select clearance Desktop Computer Packages and enjoy no interest for 12 months. Circuitcity.com has free shipping on all its online items.
notes: Extracted from "Circuit City" section

metric_name: CompUSA: buying tips for week of 2003-06-15
metric_value: CompUSA.com tends to continue selling "older" PC models after BestBuy.com and CircuitCity.com have removed them. This means you can get better deals on models that retailers want off the shelves to make room for the newer versions.
notes: Extracted from "CompUSA" section

metric_name: Dell: buying tips for week of 2003-06-15
metric_value: Dell's deals include free shipping on all models and free hard drive upgrades. Also look for $50 off instantly on the 4600 line and $100 the 8300 and XPS models.
notes: Extracted from "Dell" section

metric_name: eMachines: buying tips for week of 2003-06-15
metric_value: EMachines has once again revamped its line of models. EMachine's newest models launched at the same price points as its former brethren.
notes: Extracted from "eMachines" section

metric_name: Gateway: buying tips for week of 2003-06-15
metric_value: Gateway.com seems to change its online graphics and layout almost weekly. While these frequent changes are initially confusing, Gateway does endeavor to make its website as user-friendly as possible.
notes: Extracted from "Gateway" section

metric_name: Sony: buying tips for week of 2003-06-15
metric_value: Sony.com offers a plethora of models right now, although, like eMachines, the best deals usually come from bundled retail offers. Receive free shipping, and a free Epson C42UX printer after mail-in rebate at Sony Online this week.
notes: Extracted from "Sony" section

metric_name: HP and Compaq: buying tips for week of 2003-06-15
metric_value: HP Online offers competitive prices on its retail models, although national retailers usually carry well-priced bundled deals. For a few weeks www.hpshopping.com had the best prices on both HP and Compaq PCs.
notes: Extracted from "HP and Compaq" section
